song.title: Fall Afresh
song.lyrics: [V1] Awaken my soul, come awake To hunger, to seek, to thirst Awaken first love, come awake And do as You did at first [C] Spirit of the Living God come fall afresh on me Come awake me from my sleep Blow through the caverns of my soul Pour in me to overflow, [V2] Awaken my soul, come awake To worship with all your strength [B] Come and fill this place Let Your glory now invade Spirit come and fill this place Let Your glory now invade
song.author: Jeremy Riddle
